\begin{table}[htbp]
  \centering
  \caption{Insert throughput (req/s) under three durability regimes, toggled at runtime: the primary asymmetric-relaxed configuration, full default durability, and symmetric relaxed (MySQL doublewrite also disabled).   \label{tab:durability}
  \begin{tabular}{l r r r}
    \toprule

    PostgreSQL, native \texttt{pg} & 7136 & 6015 & 7042 \\
    PostgreSQL, MikroORM & 1494 & 1478 & 1502 \\
    MySQL, native \texttt{mysql2} & 718 & 891 & 851 \\
    MySQL, MikroORM & 659 & 713 & 734 \\
    \midrule
    PostgreSQL spread (native/slowest) & 4.78$\times$ & 4.07$\times$ & 4.69$\times$ \\
    MySQL spread (native/slowest) & 1.09$\times$ & 1.25$\times$ & 1.16$\times$ \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}
